productDisplayName: Nike Men Black Air Visi Pro Sports Shoes
description: Style Note A low profile running shoe, the Air Visi Pro II is engineered with lightweight technology to offer a cushioned and comfortable ride. Pair this with jeans and tees to get that casually stylish look when not on the run. Product Details Lightweight nubuck and synthetic leather upper with perforations for maximum breathability, comfort and style Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit with a meshed and cushioned tongue for maximum comfort  nike swoosh on lateral ankle for support and style with a padded and meshed sockliner for comfortable in-step  TPU midfoot saddle for lightweight support and comfort Plush phylon midsole for superior underfoot cushioning, offering a smooth ride  Cushioned footbed for shock absorption and impact protection Made of durable carbon rubber to provide ample durability in high wear areas and protection from shock  Waffle and herringbone pattern on the outsole to provide greater grip and traction  Pivot point on big toe mound for easy turning of the foot Nike Air technology to provide ample cushioning by evenly spreading out shock across the forefoot, enhancing propulsion  Impact guidance system along the centre of the foot length for better traction and propulsion  Forefoot outsole embedded onto upper as a toe guard to enhance durability and protect the toes Material and Care Synthetic, nubuck Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean  Do not store under sunlight
